{{- $description := site.Params.description | default site.Title -}}
# {{ site.Title }}

> {{ $description | plainify }}

Author: {{ site.Params.author | default site.Title }}
Rights: Original writing by {{ site.Params.author | default site.Title }}. All rights reserved unless a page says otherwise.
Canonical site: {{ site.Home.Permalink }}
Sitemap: {{ "sitemap.xml" | absURL }}
RSS: {{ "index.xml" | absURL }}
Atom: {{ "atom.xml" | absURL }}

## Primary Pages

{{- range where site.RegularPages "Section" "" }}
{{- if and .Title (not .Params.searchHidden) (not .Params.robotsNoIndex) (not .Draft) }}
- [{{ .Title }}]({{ .Permalink }}){{ with (.Description | default .Summary) }} - {{ . | plainify | truncate 180 }}{{ end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

## Articles

{{- range site.RegularPages.ByDate.Reverse }}
{{- if and .Title (eq .Section "posts") (not .Params.searchHidden) (not .Params.robotsNoIndex) }}
- [{{ .Title }}]({{ .Permalink }}){{ with .Date }} (published {{ .Format "2006-01-02" }}){{ end }}{{ with (.Description | default .Summary) }} - {{ . | plainify | truncate 180 }}{{ end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

## Other Collections

{{- range site.Sections }}
{{- if ne .Section "posts" }}
### {{ .Title }}
{{- range .RegularPages.ByTitle }}
{{- if and .Title (not .Params.searchHidden) (not .Params.robotsNoIndex) }}
- [{{ .Title }}]({{ .Permalink }}){{ with (.Description | default .Summary) }} - {{ . | plainify | truncate 180 }}{{ end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
